principles: Authority through Clarity: No clutter, just truth.
Dual-Layer Architecture: Visual distinction between Official Record (Immutable) and Engagement (Interactive).
Accessibility First: High contrast, clear hierarchy, reduced motion preference.
The Paper Metaphor: Layer 1 feels like a pristine, digital document. Layer 2 feels like a modern app.

containers.official_doc: bg-white rounded-none border-2 border-slate-200 shadow-md max-w-4xl mx-auto p-12 print:shadow-none print:border-none

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-primary/90 h-10 px-4 py-2 rounded-md font-medium transition-colors
buttons.secondary: bg-secondary text-secondary-foreground hover:bg-secondary/80 h-10 px-4 py-2 rounded-md font-medium transition-colors
buttons.ghost: hover:bg-accent hover:text-accent-foreground h-10 px-4 py-2 rounded-md font-medium transition-colors
buttons.official: border-2 border-primary text-primary hover:bg-primary hover:text-white h-10 px-6 rounded-none uppercase tracking-wider font-bold text-xs

inputs.default: flex h-10 w-full rounded-md border border-input bg-background px-3 py-2 text-sm ring-offset-background file:border-0 file:bg-transparent file:text-sm file:font-medium placeholder:text-muted-foreground focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-ring focus-visible:ring-offset-2 disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50

cards.service_record: rounded-none border-l-4 border-l-primary bg-white shadow-sm p-6

assets.logo_placeholder: Use a simple geometric shield or pillar icon in Primary Blue

instructions_to_main_agent: STRICTLY distinguish between Layer 1 (Official) and Layer 2 (Engagement).
Layer 1 pages (Service Book, Profile) must look like digitized paper: White backgrounds, high contrast, serif titles, minimal rounded corners.
Layer 2 pages (Dashboard, Requests) should look like a modern SaaS: Soft shadows, rounded corners (xl), colorful charts.
Use the 'Manrope' font for all UI headings. Use 'Merriweather' ONLY for the 'Service Book' document title.
Implement a 'Dark Mode' toggle, but ensure the 'Service Book' view remains high-contrast (like a paper document) even in dark mode or switches to a specific 'Blueprint' style.
Ensure all interactive elements have 'data-testid' attributes.
For the AI Assistant, use a floating panel or a dedicated sidebar that feels distinct from the main content.
universal_guidelines: Do not use gradients for text.
Use 2x more padding than you think is necessary.
Never use pure black (#000000). Use Slate-950 (#020617) or similar.
